title: Gooey Sweet Greek Dates Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Greek dish featuring medjool dates and score-fat, this recipe is peppery, molten, and vegetarian-friendly, perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread a date, a cube of pita bread, and a sprinkle of feta cheese onto each skewer.
Drizzle the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Bake the skewers in the oven for 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the bread is toasted.
While the skewers are baking, mix the honey and balsamic glaze in a small bowl.
After removing the skewers from the oven, brush them with the honey and balsamic glaze mixture.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the skewers and serve immediately.
Serve the skewers warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
